TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Dave_Anthony, title = Dave_Anthony, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dave_Anthony} }

S.FORM: == Dave Anthony == kawas tay 1967, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 8, Dave Anthony, squliq na Bunge'. Dave Anthony Belushi, minkahul sa California na Amirika. Dave Anthony hiya ga m' Engi. Dave Anthony htagan ben sa cyaliboniya. hiya yutas ga squilq na Irish з§»ж°‘,yaba ga еҫӢеё«,yaya ga зҗҶй«®её«. Anthony's yaba ga,lokah nbuqom),yaya ga й…—й…’иҖ… na laqi,hiya maki qutux qbsuyan kneril,hopa sazing kawas nya, Pam lalu nya.qani еӨ«еҰ» maki Anthony pqwasan biru yaya ru yaba likong la. Anthony mosoq mqwas beh Marin Catholic pqwasan biru й«ҳдёӯ ru maki California, Santa Barbara magal иҮӘз„¶ kian' pqwasan biru. t'aring magal kawas,Anthony balun nya mtzyaw syaqan na psibay squilq. Anthony taring mqwas ru myugi pincyogan maki San, Francisco,maki magal kawas nya.qnxan ru иЎЁжј” payat kawas maki New York.ru musa maki Los,Angeles.maki Los,Angeles lga,taring mtzyaw psibay squilq ru дҪңе®¶,ж’ӯе®ў. mintzyuwaw nya kawas 1989,Anthony t'aring mqwas ru myugi na psibay жј”жҲІ. hiya ga еёёе®ў maki San,Francisco na qsinu hlahuy.Anthony mhtuw cingay telivi na е–®еҸЈе–ңеҠҮ, Jimmy Kimmel Live, The Late Late Show ru Comedy Central. raral ga,hiya maki US cingay kian mhtuw psibay qnxan nya kawas 2006,hiya ru Heather wal kekong la.maki qutux mlikuy laqi ru sazing hozil Maple ru Larry lalu nya. kinblayan cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

== Dave Anthony == kawas tay 1967, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 8, Dave Anthony, squliq na Bunge'. Dave Anthony Belushi, minkahul sa California na Amirika. Dave Anthony hiya ga m' Engi. Dave Anthony htagan ben sa cyaliboniya. hiya yutas ga squilq na Irish з§»ж°‘,yaba ga еҫӢеё«,yaya ga зҗҶй«®её«. Anthony's yaba ga,lokah nbuqom),yaya ga й…—й…’иҖ… na laqi,hiya maki qutux qbsuyan kneril,hopa sazing kawas nya, Pam lalu nya.qani еӨ«еҰ» maki Anthony pqwasan biru yaya ru yaba likong la. Anthony mosoq mqwas beh Marin Catholic pqwasan biru й«ҳдёӯ ru maki California, Santa Barbara magal иҮӘз„¶ kian' pqwasan biru. t'aring magal kawas,Anthony balun nya mtzyaw syaqan na psibay squilq. Anthony taring mqwas ru myugi pincyogan maki San, Francisco,maki magal kawas nya.qnxan ru иЎЁжј” payat kawas maki New York.ru musa maki Los,Angeles.maki Los,Angeles lga,taring mtzyaw psibay squilq ru дҪңе®¶,ж’ӯе®ў. mintzyuwaw nya kawas 1989,Anthony t'aring mqwas ru myugi na psibay жј”жҲІ. hiya ga еёёе®ў maki San,Francisco na qsinu hlahuy.Anthony mhtuw cingay telivi na е–®еҸЈе–ңеҠҮ, Jimmy Kimmel Live, The Late Late Show ru Comedy Central. raral ga,hiya maki US cingay kian mhtuw psibay qnxan nya kawas 2006,hiya ru Heather wal kekong la.maki qutux mlikuy laqi ru sazing hozil Maple ru Larry lalu nya. kinblayan cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == *a*e antД§onj == kawas~Й• taj ****, rjax s~Й•a taj ** nqu taj *, *a*e antД§onj, s~Й•quliq na ОІuЕӢeК”. *a*e antД§onj ОІelus~Й•Д§i, minkaД§ul s~Й•a КҰ~КЁali*ornia na amirika. *a*e antД§onj Д§ija ЙЈa mК” eЕӢi. *a*e antД§onj Д§taЙЈan ОІen s~Й•a КҰ~КЁjaliОІonija. Д§ija jutas~Й• ЙЈa s~Й•quilq na iris~Й•Д§ **,jaОІa ЙЈa **,jaja ЙЈa ***. antД§onjК”s~Й• jaОІa ЙЈa,lokaД§ nОІuqom),jaja ЙЈa *** na laqi,Д§ija maki qutux qОІs~Й•ujan kneril,Д§opa s~Й•aziЕӢ kawas~Й• nja, pam lalu nja.qani ** maki antД§onj pqwas~Й•an ОІiru jaja ru jaОІa likoЕӢ la. antД§onj mos~Й•oq mqwas~Й• ОІeД§ marin КҰ~КЁatД§oliКҰ~КЁ pqwas~Й•an ОІiru ** ru maki КҰ~КЁali*ornia, s~Й•anta ОІarОІara maЙЈal ** kianК” pqwas~Й•an ОІiru. tК”ariЕӢ maЙЈal kawas~Й•,antД§onj ОІalun nja mtzjaw s~Й•jaqan na ps~Й•iОІaj s~Й•quilq. antД§onj tariЕӢ mqwas~Й• ru mjuЙЈi pinКҰ~КЁjoЙЈan maki s~Й•an, *ranКҰ~КЁis~Й•КҰ~КЁo,maki maЙЈal kawas~Й• nja.qnxan ru ** pajat kawas~Й• maki new jork.ru mus~Й•a maki los~Й•,aЕӢeles~Й•.maki los~Й•,aЕӢeles~Й• lЙЈa,tariЕӢ mtzjaw ps~Й•iОІaj s~Й•quilq ru **,**. mintzjuwaw nja kawas~Й• ****,antД§onj tК”ariЕӢ mqwas~Й• ru mjuЙЈi na ps~Й•iОІaj **. Д§ija ЙЈa ** maki s~Й•an,*ranКҰ~КЁis~Й•КҰ~КЁo na qs~Й•inu Д§laД§uj.antД§onj mД§tuw КҰ~КЁiЕӢaj teli*i na ****, *immj kimmel li*e, tД§e late late s~Й•Д§ow ru КҰ~КЁome*j КҰ~КЁentral. raral ЙЈa,Д§ija maki us~Й• КҰ~КЁiЕӢaj kian mД§tuw ps~Й•iОІaj qnxan nja kawas~Й• ****,Д§ija ru Д§eatД§er wal kekoЕӢ la.maki qutux mlikuj laqi ru s~Й•aziЕӢ Д§ozil maple ru larrj lalu nja. kinОІlajan КҰ~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК” lis~Й•ts~Й• o* aКҰ~КЁtors~Й•
